CREQ_java_catalog.title: Catalog class definition
CREQ_java_catalog.content: The class Catalog shall declare a public name field of type String.

CREQ_java_reader.title: Reader interface
CREQ_java_reader.content: The interface Reader shall declare a single read() method returning a String.

CREQ_java_catalog_service.title: CatalogService orchestrates persistence
CREQ_java_catalog_service.content: The class CatalogService shall expose loadCatalog() and saveCatalog(). loadCatalog shall throw CatalogError when path is null; saveCatalog shall throw InvalidPathError when path is null.
